title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
